biteOfDay: Morning no-generation windows on Taneycomo = prime wading conditions. Pink worms under floats below Fall Creek for rainbows. Table Rock: Whopper Plopper at dawn before the heat sets in.

tableRock.clarity: Clear main lake; stained river arms

taneycomo.generation: Mornings off until ~1-2 PM (past 4+ days). Afternoons ramp to ~12,800 cfs from 4-8 PM.

species.name: Largemouth & Spotted Bass
species.technique: Topwater at dawn (Whopper Plopper), deep crankbaits, flutter spoons, jigs over main lake points

species.name: Smallmouth Bass
species.technique: Hwy 86 bridge to Campbell Point area

species.name: Crappie
species.technique: Standing timber, docks. Live minnows or soft plastic Swimming Minnows

species.name: Walleye
species.technique: Trolling near channel swings, deep points. James River, Kings River, upper White River arms

species.name: Rainbow Trout
species.technique: Pink worm under float below Fall Creek. Branson Landing area — spoon from pier. Scuds, mega worm, zebra midges in trophy area

species.name: Brown Trout
species.technique: Available but selective. Night crawlers Fall Creek to Cooper Creek

species.name: Bluegill
species.technique: Live crickets or worms, gravel areas and points. Peak season through early July

species.name: Catfish
species.technique: Cut bait, stink bait near woody structure. 751 brush piles added Nov 2022-Mar 2024

weather.rain: 60% chance PM thunderstorms. Weekend cooling — Sun 87°F

tip: Morning is the magic window on both lakes. Taneycomo no-generation until ~1-2 PM — best wading before noon. Table Rock topwater at sunrise. Stay hydrated, heat index ~101°F.
